title: Animated World
description: a minecraft resouce pack that animates and remakes minecraft items!
body:
# 
adds animation to non animated minecraft items such as totems, **swords**, **ores** and **armor**! and redraw some items too


![totem of undying animated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dce438a275833c30f61a90ab231ec1ef0aba4e57.gif)


![animated ender pearl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a578b1b975811f2fc9a27e0ad5f51b73cb69953b.gif)
![animated ender eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de9b2d0b78213d4d44d4183ffa14a5f9905c523b.gif)
![animated heart of the sea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e3344c21485764a708011a1a095e7fb5b76ef3f.gif)
![cat music disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea14827f139a0583b941bdcdf73b515838c2a0ab.gif)
![animated diamond sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dda25790da082ca68371350845c86bd5b8096871.gif)






liked this project?

play more here!
